meaning: n.[圣经]毗斯迦山(在死海东北方)
examples: This is most obvious at the Pisgah Volcano off I-40 east of LA.
And from Bamoth to the valley in Moab where the top of Pisgah overlooks the wasteland.
Then Moses climbed Mount Nebo from the plains of Moab to the top of Pisgah, across from Jericho.
The Bryants disappeared after going for a hike in Pisgah National Forest.
Pisgah United Methodist church in Alpharetta lost four of its congregation members in the crash: The minister's son Ray Lathem III, Hispanic ministry pastor Carlos Gonzalez and Dana and Roger Lane.
